prompt: A refined vertical fine-art portrait of a Japanese actress and singer shown from about the waist up, centered and facing forward, with dark black wavy mullet-length hair brushed back from the forehead and softly framing the ears and neck, wearing a dramatic deep crimson chiffon blouse or dress with oversized translucent ruffles at the collar, chest, and sleeve cuffs. Her hands are gently folded at the lower center of the frame in a calm formal pose. The face area is deliberately obscured by a flat rectangular skin-toned block with no facial features visible, creating an anonymized editorial-art effect. The background is an elaborate Japanese-inspired collage made of torn washi-paper textures and gilded surfaces, with exactly 2 red torii gates on the right side at different scales, exactly 1 dark five-story pagoda on the left side, red maple leaves across the upper right, bamboo silhouettes on the upper left, and delicate gold botanical motifs in the lower corners. Use a rich palette of burgundy, vermilion, burnt umber, black, teal, parchment, and gold leaf, with painterly brushwork, softly blended shadows, antique screen painting aesthetics, and luxurious museum-quality lighting. The composition should feel elegant, moody, and ceremonial, mixing contemporary portrait photography with traditional Japanese byobu and nihonga influences.
